name: ate-smt7-diff
description: SMT7 ATE test program diff MCP tools and agent workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Compare SMT7 flow packages through MCP
interface.longDescription: Use ATE SMT7 Diff to compare Advantest 93K SMT7 flow files and program packages from Codex. The plugin bundles a local stdio MCP server plus a skill that guides package discovery, flow diffing, report querying, validation, and export workflows.
